## Notes for review (all optional — submit with whatever you have)

Unchecked boxes are completely fine; they just tell review where to help.

- [ ] `bun run check` passes locally (build → typecheck → test → size)
- [ ] Behavior changes are described in the PR (spec wording can be shaped together during review)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md line for user-visible changes
- [ ] Size-gate changes, if any, mentioned below
